message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Need remaining 4 approvals for consensus">
Multiple reviewers have already examined the code and approved. If you haven't sent your formal approval/consensus yet, please do so now. We have approvals from: Scott Wlaschin, Carson Gross, Luca Palmieri, and Heydon Pickering. Still need: Steve Schoger, Steve Krug, Kent Beck, Marty Cagan.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already sent my review and approval in my previous message. Let me confirm explicitly to the team lead that I'm giving formal consensus.

input.content: To be explicit: Carson Gross -- APPROVED. I consent to the current state of all 4 follow-ups. The HTMX interactions are correct, the toggle test properly exercises the outerHTML swap path, and the hypermedia patterns are sound. Ready to proceed to Task #5 (pipeline verification and commit).
input.summary: Formal consensus: APPROVED on all 4 follow-ups

routing.summary: Formal consensus: APPROVED on all 4 follow-ups

content.text: Sent my formal approval. My consensus was already implicit in my earlier detailed review, but I've now made it explicit: **APPROVED** on all 4 follow-ups. The team lead has my vote -- 5 of 9 confirmed (Scott, Carson, Luca, Heydon, plus whoever else has come in). Waiting on Steve Schoger, Steve Krug, Kent Beck, and Marty Cagan.
